{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the purpose of adding a column 'commission' with a domain to the Employee table?",
      "options": [
        "A) To store employee name",
        "B) To store employee salary and commission",
        "C) To store employee department",
        "D) To store employee date of birth"
      ],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "To store employee salary and commission, providing a specific data type to ensure accurate commission calculations."
